allowed_fixes: CSV, funding pagination or event alignment
implementation defects that leave the fixed economic rules and gates unchanged
capital: Two fully funded units: one spot notional and one perpetual-short collateral unit; all PnL divided by two

data_sequence.confirmation: BNBUSDT spot/perpetual/funding 2021-2025; completely unviewed; only after fixed BTC evaluation
data_sequence.development: BTCUSDT spot/perpetual/funding 2021-2023; spot and basis unviewed
data_sequence.evaluation: BTCUSDT spot/perpetual/funding 2024-2025; spot and basis unviewed; only after development gate

development_gate: active 8h intervals >= 300; positive base noncompounded return; at least two positive development years; 9-interval circular-block bootstrap 95% active-mean lower bound > 0
exit: After a settled funding rate <= 0, including that settlement, then close at the aligned 8h boundary
holdout_release_rule: BTC evaluation only after one threshold passes development; BNB confirmation only after fixed BTC evaluation; no rule changes after either release
known_exposure: BTC perpetual prices and funding rates were viewed in the prior naked-carry study, but BTC spot/basis and all BNB inputs were not viewed before this checkpoint
question: Does a same-venue long-spot/short-perpetual position entered after positive settled funding and exited after non-positive settled funding retain positive returns after basis, actual later funding, two-leg costs and two fully funded capital units, and transfer from BTC to BNB?
